title.en: Beyond the Hype: The Real Moat is Extreme Testing (-40°C to +300°C)
title.zh: 超越炒作：真正的护城河是极端测试 (-40°C 至 +300°C)

excerpt.en:
Claim: Everyone claims 160°C capability, but few can prove it.

Reality: The future belongs to those who build CNAS-level infrastructure to verify R744/Steam systems under extreme load boundaries.

Principle: Verification > Specification.
excerpt.zh:
行业宣称：行业都在宣称 160°C 能力，但鲜有能证明者。

现实情况：未来属于那些构建 CNAS 级基础设施以验证 R744/蒸汽系统在极端负载边界下的性能的团队。

核心原则：验证 > 规格。
